channel.title: Courses on FEBUS lab
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on FEBUS lab

item.title: Introduction to Nuclear Reactor Engineering
item.description: Introductory course on nuclear engineering for energy production

item.title: Thermodynamics and heat transfer
item.description: Introductory course on thermodynamics and heat transfer for mechatronics engineers

item.title: Fluid Mechanics and Fluid Power
item.description: Introductory course on fluid mechanics and fluid power for mechatronics engineers
